name: Content Library Size

name: Cross-Platform Compatibility
description: Whether the app is available on multiple platforms such as iOS and Android.

description: Ability to broadcast simultaneously to multiple platforms

name: Multistreaming Capability
description: Ability to stream simultaneously to multiple platforms

name: Platform availability
description: Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, or both

name: Podcast Library Size
description: Number of available podcast titles in the app's database

name: Price Alert Feature
description: Ability to set alerts for price drops or deals on specific items

name: User Base Size
description: Number of active users or downloads indicating app popularity and community size
sources: App Store, Google Play, Google Play Store, Industry Reports, Switcherstudio
